# Gokulam Farm Stay

## Business Summary
Gokulam Farm Stay is a premier luxury farm stay located in Shamirpet, Hyderabad, Telangana. It offers a perfect getaway for relaxation, family gatherings, and celebrations. Nestled in nature, it provides premium facilities to ensure a comfortable and memorable experience for all guests.

## Services & Amenities
- Luxury AC Farmhouse
- Pristine Swimming Pool
- High-quality Music System
- Open Sky Courtyard
- Indoor and Outdoor Games (Chess, Carroms, etc.)
- Outdoor and Indoor Kitchens
- Barbecue (BBQ) Area
- 2KV Inverter Backup

## Contact Information
- Address: Tunkhikhalsa, Gajwel 502336, Telangana, India
- Phone: +91 77994 99616, +91 97014 00144
- WhatsApp: +91 77994 99616
